question: The line chart shows output by year. Which of the following statements is supported by the chart?

options.B: Output in the middle year was the highest visible before the last year.
options.C: The values for the last year and the previous year are identical.
options.D: The point for the last year is cut off by the axis range, so its exact value cannot be read from the chart.

explanation: Values exceeding the y-axis range are clipped, making the top bars look the same and misleading viewers.
